title: chat() param: lightwalletd → lightwalletd_url
description: In commands.rs, chat() takes a parameter named 'lightwalletd: Option<String>'. The name matches the daemon, not the value it holds. 'lightwalletd_url' would make it clear this is a URL string, consistent with relay_url on the same function. The same rename would propagate to the two lwd_endpoints construction blocks inside the function.
